creator: dominik.muth@gmx.de
text: I'm experiencing this in 10.3 Release on a Toshiba Satelite L10-104. The hints respectively patches mentioned make it boot. However it crashes when starting xorg with the intel driver. It works with the vesa driver, but I need hardware acceleration (2D is OK, no need for OpenGL). Anybody ever running FreeBSD with xorg and the Intel driver on a 855GM successfully?
